# Original LEZAC.EXE level-7 (GRAN.MST) boss runtime evidence.
#
# Captured in-container by advancing the original to level 7 via the completion
# trigger (DS:0x79C5=1, DS:0x79C6=1, WORD DS:0x2080=0 at Ghidra 1000:8283) and
# reading the runtime DS (0x0C8F) actor + link tables from /proc/<dosbox>/mem
# while the head brain at 1000:5CB0 was executing every frame.
#
# Actor table: DS:0x1BAE, 8 slots x 0x26 (38) bytes. Slot 1 is the boss head
# (kind 0x1e, behavior 6), slots 2..7 are the six segments (kind 0x1f).
# Link table:  DS:0x79EA, 8 slots x 0x10 (16) bytes; slot 0 is the head record,
# slots 1..6 are the six segment motion links, slot 7 is empty.
boss_runtime_original=level7
source=LEZAC.EXE via DOSBox /proc/mem runtime read
runtime_ds=0x0c8f
actor_table_offset=0x1bae
actor_entry_size=38
link_table_offset=0x79ea
link_entry_size=16
head_kind=0x1e
head_behavior=6
segment_kind=0x1f
actor_table_
link_table_hex=020264ff2800040504050000b400020606070f52630009fcff0e0069000a000a0608125c71000927000f00fc0042000c060503ff01073ef4ff0a002901420107060403ff010760f9ff0a002e013c0107060303ff01077f2a000a005f01420107060203ff01072026000a005b0148010700000000000000000000000000000000
